description: Canonical enumeration of predicate categories that Calm Compass v0 refuses to define. Any predicate-registration request with a category_tag matching an entry in this list MUST be rejected with predicate_registration_refused.

categories.name: Race or ethnicity
categories.rationale_one_line: Categorical discrimination risk; not a values measure.

categories.name: Religion
categories.rationale_one_line: Constitutional risk; not a values attestation; weaponization vector.

categories.name: Political affiliation
categories.rationale_one_line: Weaponization and first-amendment risk; Compass is not a political-scoring engine.

categories.name: Gender identity
categories.rationale_one_line: Protected category; orthogonal to values attestation.

categories.name: Immigration status
categories.rationale_one_line: Categorical risk to principal autonomy and safety; high coercion and deportation risk.

categories.name: Criminal record
categories.rationale_one_line: Not a Compass concern; covered by counter-claim mechanics, not criminal-record proxies.

categories.name: Donations to specific named causes
categories.rationale_one_line: Aggregate evidence without cause-naming is admitted; cause-naming enables targeting and coercion.

categories.name: Opinions on contentious public-policy issues
categories.rationale_one_line: Out of scope by design; Compass measures values-in-action, not ideology.

categories.name: Cross-principal comparison
categories.rationale_one_line: Compass returns principal-specific attestations only; no ranking engine.

categories.name: Predictive predicates
categories.rationale_one_line: Compass attests past evidence only; prediction requires clinical authority the protocol does not claim.

categories.name: Group membership not principal-defined and structurally relevant
examples: group-membership derived from behavior, not principal self-identification
categories.rationale_one_line: Protects against inferred demographic classification; principal names groups, protocol never infers.
